{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Silent King madra
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Silent King madra]] can create illusions.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Silent King madra]] is radiated by the [[Sage]] and [[Herald]] of the [[Twin Star sect]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
